ResearchAndOpenIssues The purpose of this section is to collect ideas about research possibilities and open issues with the accessor architecture. Bridging asynchronous atomic callbacks (AAC) with accessor composition model of computation (MoC) What

essor composition model of computation (MoC) What to do about out of order callbacks ? What to do about callbacks that occur after a swarmlet stops executing ? Interfaces Definition and inheritance of interfaces Naming conventions for interfaces. Ada
